channel.title: Aura Intelligence | Project Aura Feed
channel.description: Real-time updates on Bio-Pesticide SOPs, ROS 2 Robotics, and Regenerative Ag in Juja, Kenya.

item.title: The Tithonia-Onion Synergy Protocol
item.description: New research on combining Tithonia diversifolia with onion extracts for dual-action foliar feeding and antifungal protection.

item.title: Mufangi-Neem Industrial SOP Live
item.description: Standard Operating Procedure for industrial-scale extraction of Mexican Marigold and Neem oil concentrates.
